requirement_topic.zh: SANS/IEC 61851电动汽车充电设备安全
requirement_topic.zht: SANS/IEC 61851電動汽車充電設備安全

summary.en: South Africa-market technical files should be mapped to the EV conductive charging safety architecture used in IEC 61851 and any South African SANS adoption required by the purchaser, installer, utility, municipality, or conformity assessor. IEC 61851-1:2017 covers EV supply equipment characteristics, EVSE-to-EV connection, and electrical safety for EVSE with rated supply voltage up to 1 000 V AC or 1 500 V DC; its November 2023 corrigendum is included in the current IEC copy.
summary.zh: 南非市场技术文件应映射至IEC 61851所采用的电动汽车传导充电安全架构，以及采购方、安装方、公用事业、市政机构或合格评定方要求的任何南非SANS采标版本。IEC 61851-1:2017涵盖额定供电电压最高1 000 V交流或1 500 V直流的EVSE特性、EVSE与车辆连接以及EVSE电气安全；现行IEC文本包含2023年11月勘误内容。
summary.zht: 南非市場技術文件應映射至IEC 61851所採用的電動汽車傳導充電安全架構，以及採購方、安裝方、公用事業、市政機構或合格評定方要求的任何南非SANS採標版本。IEC 61851-1:2017涵蓋額定供電電壓最高1 000 V交流或1 500 V直流的EVSE特性、EVSE與車輛連接以及EVSE電氣安全；現行IEC文本包含2023年11月勘誤內容。

standards_or_laws: SANS adoption of IEC 61851 series where specified for the South African project or conformity route
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 and IEC 61851-24 for DC charging systems where applicable

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging system general requirements and GB/T 18487.2 for EMC, together with GB/T 20234 connector standards. A proposed update to cite GB/T 18487.1-2023 with a 2024-04-01 implementation date could not be verified from an official source in this review, so this row keeps the generic GB/T 18487.1 baseline. These are useful engineering baselines but should be clause-mapped to IEC 61851 and any SANS adoption instead of being treated as identical South Africa evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 18487.1传导充电系统通用要求、GB/T 18487.2电磁兼容要求，以及GB/T 20234接口标准。本次审查未能从官方来源核实将GB/T 18487.1-2023列为2024-04-01实施的拟议更新，因此本行保留GB/T 18487.1通用基线。这些是有用的工程基线，但应逐条映射至IEC 61851及任何SANS采标版本，不能视为完全相同的南非证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 18487.1傳導充電系統通用要求、GB/T 18487.2電磁相容要求，以及GB/T 20234接口標準。本次審查未能從官方來源核實將GB/T 18487.1-2023列為2024-04-01實施的擬議更新，因此本行保留GB/T 18487.1通用基線。這些是有用的工程基線，但應逐條映射至IEC 61851及任何SANS採標版本，不能視為完全相同的南非證據。

gap.en: The gap is a safety-file translation from China GB/T evidence to the IEC/SANS architecture expected in South Africa. Review control-pilot logic, protective earthing, RCD or residual-current protection assumptions, cable protection, marking, installation manual content, environmental ratings, and DC charger communication safety evidence before local installation approval.
gap.zh: 差距在于将中国GB/T证据转换为南非预期的IEC/SANS安全架构。应在本地安装批准前审查控制导引逻辑、保护接地、RCD或剩余电流保护假设、电缆保护、标识、安装手册内容、环境等级以及直流充电通信安全证据。
gap.zht: 差距在於將中國GB/T證據轉換為南非預期的IEC/SANS安全架構。應在本地安裝批准前審查控制導引邏輯、保護接地、RCD或剩餘電流保護假設、電纜保護、標識、安裝手冊內容、環境等級以及直流充電通訊安全證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only when incorporated through an applicable compulsory specification, purchaser specification, installation approval, utility or municipal connection rule; otherwise IEC/SANS evidence is a voluntary technical route and common acceptance baseline
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence is a China technical baseline and may be required by China certification schemes, but it does not replace South Africa IEC/SANS review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T 18487 safety file should be re-mapped to IEC 61851 and any specified SANS adoption before South Africa sale or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 18487安全文件在南非销售或安装前，应重新映射至IEC 61851以及任何被指定的SANS采标版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 18487安全文件在南非銷售或安裝前，應重新映射至IEC 61851以及任何被指定的SANS採標版本。
